_README: Copy this to config.json in YOUR school's classroom repo and fill in real values. One config.json per school repo. The gen-forms Action regenerates the request forms from it on every push. 'student_repo_pattern' controls the student repo name — edit it freely, but use the {course}/{semester}/{assignment}/{username} placeholders. ALWAYS use {course} (never a literal course name like 'cs120'), so copying a course block to a new course can't collide repos. If omitted, it defaults to {course}-{semester}-{assignment}-{username}.
